_comment: Source of truth for agent work scope. One feature 'in-progress' at a time. A feature is 'done' only with recorded evidence (command + result). Replace the placeholder feat-100+ entries with your real work items; keep feat-000 as the baseline gate.

features.name: Baseline green
features.description: From a clean checkout, ./init.sh passes end to end (pnpm install, prettier check, eslint, tsc --noEmit, i18n key parity, vitest). This is the precondition for all other work.
features.evidence: 2026-06-16 ./init.sh passed clean: pnpm install + postinstall OK; prettier --check OK; eslint 0 errors (19 warnings); tsc --noEmit clean; i18n key parity OK (8 locales); vitest 815 passed / 109 files.

features.name: [PLACEHOLDER] First work item
features.description: Replace with one concrete behavior/bug/change. Reference the issue (Closes #NNN) per CONTRIBUTING. Keep scope to a single concern.

features.name: [PLACEHOLDER] Verification coverage for feat-100
features.description: Add/confirm unit tests (tests/**/*.test.ts) or an eval (tests/**/*.eval.test.ts) covering the change. If it touches UI text, add locale keys and pass pnpm check:i18n-keys.

features.name: [PLACEHOLDER] Docs + handoff for feat-100
features.description: Update README/CLAUDE.md/CHANGELOG if behavior changed; record evidence in progress.md; leave repo restartable from ./init.sh.
